help_country: Select the country for holiday detection
help_state: Enter the state or province code (e.g. BY for Bayern, ZH for Zürich). Check adapter log for available codes.
help_region: Enter the region code if applicable. Check adapter log for available codes.
help_includeBridgeDays: A bridge day is a working day between a holiday and a weekend (e.g. Friday after a Thursday holiday)
help_exclude: Enter holiday IDs to exclude from detection. Start the adapter once and check the log to see all available holiday IDs.
